general.name: mos_target_tess_toi_parquet
general.description: This catalog contains targets that recieved the 2 minute cadence during the TESS Mission, are TESS Objects of Interest (TOI) or Community TESS Objects of Interest (CTOI). The contents of this catalog were derived from the MIT TESS website (https://tess.mit.edu/public/target_lists/target_lists.html) and the ExoFOP website https://exofop.ipac.caltech.edu/tess/index.php. These targets were updated on 2020-04-02.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_tess_toi.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

target_type.name: target_type
target_type.description: Type of target. Options: 2min = 2 minute cadence, exo_TOI = TOI, and exo_CTOI = CTOI

tess_disposition.name: tess_disposition
tess_disposition.description: TESS Team Dispositon Options: EB = Eclipsing Binary, KP = Known Planet, PC = Planet Candidate, O = Other, or blank

tfopwg_disposition.name: tfopwg_disposition
tfopwg_disposition.description: TESS Follow-up Observing Program (TFOP) Working Group Disposition Options: APC = Ambiguous Planet Candidate, CP = Confirmed Planet, FA = False Alarm, FP = False Positive, KP = Known Planet, PC = Planet Candidate or blank

num_sectors.name: num_sectors
num_sectors.description: The total number of sectors that this object was observed on as of the catalog date
